description: An informal letter, signed statement, or note from a household member or contributor verifying that they provide financial assistance to cover household expenses.

first_name.instruction: First name of the household member receiving the contribution.

last_name.instruction: Last name of the household member receiving the contribution.

contributor_name.instruction: The full name of the person who is contributing money or paying towards the household expenses.

contributor_relationship.instruction: Relationship of the contributor to the household (e.g., parent, friend).

contribution_amount.instruction: Dollar amount of the contribution per period.

contribution_frequency.instruction: How often the money is contributed, such as Monthly, Weekly, or One-time.

contribution_purpose.instruction: What the contribution covers (rent, utilities, food, general expenses).

statement_date.instruction: Date the letter or statement was written or signed by the contributor. YYYY-MM-DD format.

has_signature.instruction: Whether the letter or statement is signed by the contributor.
